import * as core from "../core/index.js"; import { type ZodError, ZodRealError } from "./errors.js"; export type ZodSafeParseResult<T> = ZodSafeParseSuccess<T> | ZodSafeParseError<T>; export type ZodSafeParseSuccess<T> = { success: true; data: T; error?: never }; export type ZodSafeParseError<T> = { success: false; data?: never; error: ZodError<T> }; export const parse: <T extends core.$ZodType>( schema: T, value: unknown, _ctx?: core.ParseContext<core.$ZodIssue>, _params?: { callee?: core.util.AnyFunc; Err?: core.$ZodErrorClass } ) => core.output<T> = /* @__PURE__ */ core._parse(ZodRealError) as any; export const parseAsync: <T extends core.$ZodType>( schema: T, value: unknown, _ctx?: core.ParseContext<core.$ZodIssue>, _params?: { callee?: core.util.AnyFunc; Err?: core.$ZodErrorClass } ) => Promise<core.output<T>> = /* @__PURE__ */ core._parseAsync(ZodRealError) as any; export const safeParse: <T extends core.$ZodType>( schema: T, value: unknown, _ctx?: core.ParseContext<core.$ZodIssue> // _params?: { callee?: core.util.AnyFunc; Err?: core.$ZodErrorClass } ) => ZodSafeParseResult<core.output<T>> = /* @__PURE__ */ core._safeParse(ZodRealError) as any; export const safeParseAsync: <T extends core.$ZodType>( schema: T, value: unknown, _ctx?: core.ParseContext<core.$ZodIssue> ) => Promise<ZodSafeParseResult<core.output<T>>> = /* @__PURE__ */ core._safeParseAsync(ZodRealError) as any;
